LanguageData.USAC_Apparel_AssaultHelmet.label: Assault helmet
LanguageData.USAC_Apparel_AssaultHelmet.description: A lightweight tactical helmet made with a composite plasteel shell, which can be fitted with different additional components in addition to earmuffs as needed.
LanguageData.USAC_Apparel_HeavyHelmet.label: Heavy helmet
LanguageData.USAC_Apparel_HeavyHelmet.description: Composite plasteel protective helmets with enhanced frontal shrapnel protection are widely used by machine gunners and heavy infantry support infantry units engaged in high-profile combat on the battlefield contact line.
LanguageData.USAC_Apparel_MeleeHelmet.label: Gladiator helmet
LanguageData.USAC_Apparel_MeleeHelmet.description: A tactical helmet for use in indoor environments features bulletproof eyepieces that protect the eyes from shrapnel and burns, but its reflectivity at certain angles can hinder aiming during firing.
LanguageData.USAC_Apparel_NightVisionHelmet.label: Night vision helmet
LanguageData.USAC_Apparel_NightVisionHelmet.descripti: A lightweight tactical helmet with added night vision goggles can improve shooting ability and accuracy. However, the forward center of gravity reduces reaction time in close-range combat.
